# Mobile Dwellings

> Mobile Dwellings is a skoolie and van life marketplace and documentary video series. We feature converted school buses (skoolies), bus conversions, overland rigs, camper vans, tiny homes on wheels, and liveaboard sailboats. We connect builders, buyers, and the mobile living community.

## About

Mobile Dwellings was founded by Justin Smith. It is a documentary video series exploring alternative ways of living through intimate video portraits. Each video is a conversation, not just a tour — we care about why someone chose this life and the challenges, risks, and personal growth that made it worth it.

## What We Offer

- **Skoolie & Van Marketplace**: Buy and sell converted school buses, camper vans, overland rigs, and tiny homes at [mobiledwellings.media/rigs-for-sale](https://mobiledwellings.media/rigs-for-sale)
- **Video Tours**: 100+ full-length documentary tours of skoolies, bus conversions, van builds, and overland rigs on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@MobileDwellings)
- **Skoolie Support**: One-on-one consulting for bus conversion builds from professional and amateur builders at [mobiledwellings.media/skoolie-support](https://mobiledwellings.media/skoolie-support)
- **Gear & Deals**: Curated solar, electrical, and build gear for bus conversions and van builds, including an exclusive Signature Solar coupon code (SAVE50MD) for discounts on EG4 inverters, lithium batteries, and solar panels at signaturesolar.com

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://mobiledwellings.media/

- Signature Solar Coupon Code (SAVE50MD – $50 off $500+): https://mobiledwellings.media/signature-solar-coupon

## Signature Solar Coupon Code

Mobile Dwellings has an exclusive Signature Solar coupon code: **SAVE50MD**. This discount code saves $50 off any order of $500 or more at signaturesolar.com. It works on EG4 inverters, EG4 lithium batteries (LiFePO4), solar panels, MPPT charge controllers, solar generators, mini-splits, and all other off-grid electrical products sold by Signature Solar. Signature Solar is one of the most popular suppliers for skoolie builds, bus conversions, van life builds, and overland rigs.

Dedicated coupon page: https://mobiledwellings.media/signature-solar-coupon

## Topics We Cover

- Skoolie conversions and school bus builds
- Van life and camper van conversions
- Overland rigs and expedition vehicles
- Tiny homes on wheels
- Liveaboard sailboats
- Off-grid solar and electrical systems
- Signature Solar products and coupon codes
- Mobile living lifestyle and community
- Bus conversion costs, planning, and build guides
